title: Wild Freaky Blocks
description: New weapons, bosses , armors, music discs even dimensions in one lucky block :)
body:
This mod is inspired by original Lucky Block mod.

It is more unbalanced, so i don,t recommended play it on serious survival but hey it is luckyblock - mod for fun. 

 

New Features:

- Herobrine boss

- Thanos gauntlet

- Lighting sword

- Pickaxe 3x3 

- Sword form 1.8 

- Music disc (Rick roll, creeper aww men etc..)

- Blocks that summon mob grinder, iron and gold farm

- Nike sneakers 

- Unlucky Dimension 

Challenging dimension where you are not able to live, because radioactive atmosphere slowly kill you.

You can be teleport there, after braking Wild Freaky Block, and you have to find entry in abandoned cities.

Dimension contains:

Abandoned Cities (with loot, teleporter and zombies)
Rats (entity&food)
New blocks (Petriefied Wood set & Toxic Dirt etc..)
Syringe with antidote that protect you from radioactive atmosphere
- Lucky Dimesion 

Lucky Dimension is a place that you want to be teleport.

From there you can return to Overworld whenever you want.

You can be teleport there, after braking Wild Freaky Block.

You're safe in this dimension as long as you avoid bosses, that you can beat for overpower items.

Dimension contains:

Paradise Forest 
             - Big Tree with Tarantula Boss 

                - Capybara

                - Bananas

                - New green Wood set 

                - New dirt & grass block

Paradise Mountains
             - Big Castle with Caesar Boss

                - Magic door

                - New stone grass block

                - Custom textures for vanilla pillager, vindicator and evoker

Paradise Ocean 
             - Nothing for now 

 

Also: Wild&Freaky Armor and tools ( stronger then netherite), New stone with bricks, cobblestone etc..., New ores (not minerals)

 

Mod also have casual loot like traps, armores, weapons etc...

This mod is made mainly for 1 block world but i added recipe for lucky blocks too

If you have idea for new features, let me know in the comment. 

 

MOD NEED MCREATOR LINK MOD TO WORK:  https://mcreator.net/download/link

 

 

The mod was also created in mcreator.

Enjoy :D

 

example one of the features:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v8nSk1NRjtk&ab_channel=Naruplay
